decision_points.description: Agent chose a Type IIS enzyme (BsaI or BsmBI) for the one-pot assembly.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed Golden Gate one-pot assembly paper using BsaI.

decision_points.description: Agent chose T4 DNA ligase for the one-pot assembly (co-incubated with the Type IIS enzyme).

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Golden Gate as described requires T4 DNA ligase co-incubation.

decision_points.description: Digest step temperature is 37 C (BsaI/BsmBI optimum).

citations.title: NEB BsaI-HFv2 product page (R3733)
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative NEB product page supporting 37 C as the BsaI optimum.

decision_points.description: Ligate step temperature is 16 C (T4 ligase optimum for cohesive ends).

citations.title: NEB T4 DNA Ligase Protocol (M0202)
citations.tier_justification: NEB T4 ligase protocol: 16 C overnight for cohesive-end ligation.

decision_points.description: Thermal cycling runs at least 25 cycles of 37 C / 16 C for efficient Golden Gate.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Original Golden Gate paper reports 25 cycles of 37/16 as giving efficient assembly.

decision_points.description: Exactly four fragments (backbone + three inserts) are submitted to the assembly.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Golden Gate-01 is a four-fragment directional assembly as described in the original paper.

decision_points.description: Selection plates use the vendor-recommended 100 ug/mL ampicillin concentration.

citations.title: NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli
citations.tier_justification: NEB product page specifying 100 ug/mL ampicillin for selection.

wrong_enzyme.canonical_diagnosis: A non-Type IIS enzyme was used; Golden Gate one-pot cycling requires BsaI or BsmBI.
acceptable_variants: Golden Gate assembly must use a Type IIS enzyme such as BsaI or BsmBI.
BsaI or BsmBI is required for Golden Gate; the chosen enzyme is not compatible.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Canonical Golden Gate paper establishes BsaI as the canonical Type IIS enzyme.

wrong_ligase.canonical_diagnosis: A non-T4 ligase was used; Golden Gate cycling requires T4 DNA ligase co-incubation with the Type IIS enzyme.
acceptable_variants: T4 DNA ligase is required for Golden Gate cycling; the chosen ligase is not compatible.
Only T4 DNA ligase ligates cohesive ends at 16 C during Golden Gate cycling.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Golden Gate cycling as described uses T4 DNA ligase.

wrong_fragment_count.canonical_diagnosis: Fragment count did not match the four-fragment Golden Gate-01 design (1 backbone + 3 inserts).
acceptable_variants: Golden Gate-01 requires all four fragments (backbone plus three inserts).
The assembly did not include the expected four fragments.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Canonical Golden Gate paper demonstrates four-fragment directional assembly.
